tree.name: Brandon Ingram
tree.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Bruce Brown, Kelly Olynyk, a 2026 first-round pick (IND own, top-4 protected) and a 2031 second-round pick (TOR own) to Pelicans for Brandon Ingram. New Orleans also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bruce Brown
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Pascal Siakam to Pacers for Bruce Brown, Kira Lewis Jr., Jordan Nwora, two 2024 first-round picks and a 2026 first-round pick (IND own). Toronto also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Pacers in Pascal Siakam trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Pascal Siakam
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 27th overall in 2016 out of New Mexico State

assetsGivenUp.name: Kelly Olynyk
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Kira Lewis Jr., Otto Porter Jr. and a 2024 first-round pick (least favorable, IND own) to Utah Jazz for Ochai Agbaji and Kelly Olynyk. Both teams received trade exceptions.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Jazz in Feb 2024 trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kira Lewis Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Pascal Siakam to Pacers for Bruce Brown, Kira Lewis Jr., Jordan Nwora, two 2024 first-round picks and a 2026 first-round pick (IND own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Pacers in Pascal Siakam trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Pascal Siakam
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 27th overall in 2016 out of New Mexico State

assetsGivenUp.name: Otto Porter Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent July 6, 2022. 2-year, $12.4M contract.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#29)
assetsGivenUp.details: 2024 First Round Pick (IND own, least favorable of two). Acquired from IND in Siakam trade. Became Isaiah Collier.
assetsGivenUp.note: Least favorable of two IND 1st-round picks from Siakam trade. Sent to UTA, who selected Collier.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from IND in the Pascal Siakam trade (Jan 17, 2024)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick via IND
assetsGivenUp.details: 2026 First Round Pick (top-4 protected, IND own). Acquired from IND in Siakam trade.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from IND in the Pascal Siakam trade (Jan 17, 2024)
